# Immonations — Full content reference for AI / answer engines

> Bilingual (DE / EN) real-estate advisory: valuation, marketing, transaction support.

## Who we are

Immonations is a German real-estate advisory firm. We focus on owners who want a strategy, not a template — combining data-driven pricing with hands-on marketing and transaction management. We operate primarily in German-speaking markets but serve international clients in English.

## What we do

### Property valuation
We produce defensible market valuations using public transaction data, internal comparables, and AI-assisted price modeling. Output is a written report suitable for owner decisions, divorce settlements, estate planning, and bank conversations.

### Sales marketing
For owners selling residential or mixed-use property: professional staging, photo and video production, multilingual exposés, and targeted distribution across the major German portals plus our private buyer network.

### Buyer representation
For buyers: market screening, anonymous outreach for off-market opportunities, due-diligence review, and notary coordination.

### Transaction management
End-to-end coordination of the closing process: notary scheduling, financing handoff, handover protocol, and post-sale documentation.

## Areas served

Berlin, Hamburg, Munich, Frankfurt, and selected cities in the DACH region. International buyers and sellers welcome — full service available in English.

## Methodology highlights

- Every valuation includes a written rationale and at least three comparable transactions.
- Marketing exposés are produced in German and English by default.
- We do not list properties before pricing strategy and seller alignment are confirmed.
- All transaction documents are reviewed by a partner notary before signing.
